prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic hero shot of ONE single monolithic security checkpoint gate standing alone at the center of a dark digital void — exactly one structure, a massive dark brushed-metal archway like a monumental scanner portal, with a tall open rectangular aperture through its middle. It is emphatically a single unified gate, not two separate machines. A single continuous horizontal stream of glowing binary code travels from the far left of the frame, is forced THROUGH the gate's open aperture — there is no way around it — and exits on the far right. Inside the aperture, the passing stream is caught mid-flight and fanned open across a luminous cyan scan grid: thin volumetric scan beams read every packet while it is held inside the portal, wireframe brackets locking onto individual packet-blocks. On the exit side, the stream continues onward with each packet subtly tagged by a faint bracket — traffic enters raw, leaves inspected. The gate's inner walls of the aperture glow with the cyan scan light; a few small amber indicator lights on the frame confirm active inspection. Across the top crossbeam of the gate, the word 'PROXY' is engraved into the brushed metal in clean uppercase sans-serif letterforms, subtly backlit with a cool cyan edge glow — crisp, perfectly legible, exactly spelled 'PROXY', integrated into the metal like precision-machined signage, not a sticker or overlay. Dark brushed metal and matte black composite with subtle micro-scratches, edge-lit by a cool cyan rim light. Deep near-black surround, electric cyan dominant, controlled amber secondary accents. Strong centered symmetrical composition, the single gate dominant and sharp, calm dark negative space in the upper corners for later headline text, the stream softly blurred at the far left and right extremes. Volumetric haze, drifting particles, real depth. Shallow depth of field, subtle chromatic aberration, fine grain, real bokeh. 35mm lens, f/2.2, ISO 250. Dark-tech documentary-realism aesthetic in the style of an Apple or Nvidia launch film, tense and cinematic — the feeling of an unavoidable checkpoint reading everything that passes. Keep photoreal materials, disciplined color and one clear silhouette. Balanced, legible exposure — the luminous elements read bright, clearly exposed and detailed against deep but controlled blacks that retain detail, cohesive with the series' dark-tech grade. No muddy, murky, or underexposed haze; no crushed midtones.
negative_prompt: two separate towers, two computers, twin machines, pair of servers, duplicate structures, generic PC desktop tower, consumer computer case, ordinary server rack, data merely passing by without being caught, no interception, cartoon, illustration, video game render, cluttered busy chaos, oversaturated neon, rainbow, distorted structure, melted geometry, unreadable garbage text, misspelled text, garbled letters, warped characters, gibberish lettering, watermark, logo, low resolution, plastic toy look, cheesy sci-fi, lens flare spam, HDR halos, human face, underexposed, muddy, murky, crushed midtones, dim underexposed glow, low-contrast haze, invisible details, washed out

settings.style: documentary realism, dark-tech cinematic, two-faced proxy gateway hero
settings.lighting: cyan scan-grid volumetric beams, cool rim light on metal, amber inspection accents, deep shadow surround
settings.camera_angle: centered symmetrical hero shot, streams flowing left-to-right through node
settings.depth_of_field: shallow, gateway sharp, stream extremes soft
settings.quality: high detail, real brushed metal texture, subtle grain
